## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss landing page progress, SEO performance, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New landing page videos in progress; vertical versions pending for mobile optimization](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Record-breaking SEO performance: 400k impressions, improvements in Vallarta, Cancun, and Cabo](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Content strategy refinement: focusing on destination-specific info, tour details, and FAQs while avoiding cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Topics

### Landing Page Video Progress

  - [Videographer working on new header videos for Yelapa, Caletas, and Mahahuitas](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Vertical versions for mobile pending; Isabel awaiting these to start landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [70-75% of traffic is mobile, but desktop experience is notably superior](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Mobile landing page design praised for its stunning appearance](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [New record: 400,000 impressions achieved](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Clicks recovering from previous dip](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Specific article success: "drinking age in Mexico" (Cancun) performing well](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Vallarta showing significant improvement after targeted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Cabo also hitting record clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Content Strategy and Copywriting

  - [New version of copy with SEO considerations sent for review](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Added terms from previous research and four FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Content tailored for hotel zone visitors and day-trip perspective](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Debate on including "where to eat" and "where to stay" sections:](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [Concern about relevance and potential to mislead target audience](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Suggestion to move these topics to FAQs if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### Destination Page Structure

  - [Agreed sections: location, distance from main destination, how to get there, what to see, best time to visit, travel tips](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Emphasis on highlighting tour benefits vs. independent travel](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Inclusion of tour-specific information (e.g., what to bring, inclusions, duration)](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Suggestion to add photos within text blocks for visual appeal](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### SEO Tactics and Considerations

  - [Discussion on including low-volume keywords for potential future traction](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Focus on avoiding cannibalization with existing tour pages](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Flexibility in page structure based on destination and angle](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Await vertical versions of videos for mobile landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Revise copy to remove "where to eat" and "where to stay" sections from main content](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Consider adding relevant questions to FAQ section (e.g., "Can I stay at Marietas Island?")](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Incorporate photos into text blocks for improved visual appeal](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy to balance SEO potential with relevance and user intent](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
